nasb.text: It shall be, if you are not pleased with her, then you shall let her go wherever she wishes; but you shall certainly not sell her for money, you shall not mistreat her, because you have humbled her.

esv.text: But if you no longer delight in her, you shall let her go where she wants. But you shall not sell her for money, nor shall you treat her as a slave, since you have humiliated her.

cnv.text: 如果將來你不喜歡她，就要讓她隨意離去，決不可為了錢把她出賣，也不可以她為奴，因為你已經污辱了她。

ccb.text: 如果那人不喜欢她，则要让她自由离去，不可卖掉她，也不可奴役她，因为他已经羞辱了她。
